title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp, with a Z-Score of +3.54. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.4 GG. 
 The high temperature is combined with a relative humidity of 78% and moderate winds of 16.9 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
